subject: fix(icons): horizontal waveform design and improved gradient spread
body:
Replace vertical sine curves with horizontal audio waveform — three sine
waves with varying amplitude that read as sound/tone at all sizes. Improved
gradient from pink→purple→cyan with even spread (4 stops) so cyan and purple
are clearly visible instead of the previous pink-dominant gradient. Tail
angled more diagonally for natural feel.

Tags: icons, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: uniwind-migration
Semver: patch
